title: crataegus dodgei var. flavida
intro: Crataegus dodgei var. flavida is a variety of the flowering plant Crataegus dodgei, commonly known as hawthorn, which is a type of deciduous shrub or small tree that is native to North America. The medicinal properties of Crataegus dodgei var. flavida are attributed to its flavonoids, including oligomeric proanthocyanidin complexes (OPCs), which have been shown to have antioxidant and cardiovascular-protective effects. The health benefits of this plant are said to include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiac function, and lowering cholesterol levels, making it a popular natural remedy for cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Crataegus dodgei var. flavida include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to promote heart health and well-being.
